arabicText: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَٰنِ حِينٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًۭٔا مَّذْكُورًا
translationText: Has there come upon man a period of time when he was nothing to be mentioned?

arabicText: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍۢ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
translationText: We created man from a liquid mixture, to test him; and We made him hearing and seeing.

arabicText: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًۭا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
translationText: We guided him to the way, be he appreciative or unappreciative.

arabicText: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَٰفِرِينَ سَلَٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَٰلًۭا وَسَعِيرًا
translationText: We have prepared for the faithless chains, and yokes, and a Searing Fire.

arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍۢ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
translationText: But the righteous will drink from a cup whose mixture is aroma.

arabicText: عَيْنًۭا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًۭا
translationText: A spring from which the servants of God will drink, making it gush abundantly.

arabicText: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًۭا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًۭا
translationText: They fulfill their vows, and dread a Day whose ill is widespread.

arabicText: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًۭا وَيَتِيمًۭا وَأَسِيرًا
translationText: And they feed, for the love of Him, the poor, and the orphan, and the captive.

arabicText: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءًۭ وَلَا شُكُورًا
translationText: "We only feed you for the sake of God. We want from you neither compensation, nor gratitude.

arabicText: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًۭا قَمْطَرِيرًۭا
translationText: We dread from our Lord a frowning grim Day."

arabicText: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةًۭ وَسُرُورًۭا
translationText: So God will protect them from the ills of that Day, and will grant them radiance and joy.

arabicText: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةًۭ وَحَرِيرًۭا
translationText: And will reward them for their patience with a Garden and silk.

arabicText: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًۭا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًۭا
translationText: Reclining therein on the thrones; experiencing therein neither sun, nor frost.

arabicText: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًۭا
translationText: Its shade hovering over them, and its fruit brought low within reach.

arabicText: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍۢ مِّن فِضَّةٍۢ وَأَكْوَابٍۢ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
translationText: Passing around them are vessels of silver, and cups of crystal.

arabicText: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍۢ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًۭا
translationText: Crystal of silver-they measured them exactly.

arabicText: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًۭا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
translationText: They will be served therein with a cup whose flavor is Zanjabeel.

arabicText: عَيْنًۭا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًۭا
translationText: A spring therein named Salsabeel.

arabicText: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌۭ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًۭا مَّنثُورًۭا
translationText: Passing among them are eternalized youths. If you see them, you would think them sprinkled pearls.

arabicText: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًۭا وَمُلْكًۭا كَبِيرًا
translationText: Wherever you look, you see bliss, and a vast kingdom.

arabicText: عَٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌۭ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌۭ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍۢ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًۭا طَهُورًا
translationText: Upon them are garments of green silk, and satin. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver. And their Lord will offer them a pure drink.

arabicText: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءًۭ وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
translationText: "This is a reward for you. Your efforts are well appreciated."

arabicText: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًۭا
translationText: It is We who sent down the Quran upon you-a gradual revelation.

arabicText: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًۭا
translationText: So be patient for the decision of your Lord, and do not obey the sinner or the blasphemer among them.

arabicText: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةًۭ وَأَصِيلًۭا
translationText: And mention the Name of your Lord, morning and evening.

arabicText: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًۭا طَوِيلًا
translationText: And for part of the night, prostrate yourself to Him, and glorify Him long into the night.

arabicText: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًۭا ثَقِيلًۭا
translationText: As for these: they love the fleeting life, and leave behind a Heavy Day.

arabicText: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
translationText: We created them, and strengthened their frame; and whenever We will, We can replace them with others like them.

arabicText: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌۭ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًۭا
translationText: This is a reminder; so whoever wills, let him take a path to his Lord.

arabicText: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًۭا
translationText: Yet you cannot will, unless God wills. God is Knowing and Wise.

arabicText: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
translationText: He admits into His mercy whomever He wills. But as for the wrongdoers, He has prepared for them a painful punishment.
